channel.title: Banking on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Banking on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Personal Finance (3): Bank Wealth Management Subsidiaries — What '理财子' Actually Means
item.description: I keep seeing the term “理财子” (lǐ cái zǐ) everywhere. Bank apps push notifications about “理财子公司 exclusive products.” Finance forums debate which 理财子 has the best returns. Colleagues casually drop it at lunch: “I moved everything to ICBC’s 理财子 last month.”
